title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: self-contained CLI and server that downloads, caches, and exposes GGUF models via a REST/HTTP API.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party Python client and async helpers for chatting with Ollama’s HTTP API.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers (fetch/streams).

title: langchain-ollama (PyPI)
summary: LangChain adapter providing Ollama LLM, embed and callback components.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Full-featured ChatGPT-style web frontend that proxies to any Ollama instance.

title: ollama4j – Java/Kotlin client
summary: Community Java/Kotlin SDK wrapping Ollama REST endpoints with builders & POJOs.

title: ollama-rb – Ruby gem
summary: Lightweight Ruby client for Ollama chat, generate and embed endpoints.

title: ollama-cli – Rust TUI
summary: Rust terminal UI that browses local models and chats over Ollama HTTP API.

title: ollama-copilot – VS Code extension
summary: VS Code plugin that adds inline completion and chat sidebar powered by Ollama.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart for deploying Ollama server + models on Kubernetes.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Official Docker image and example compose stacks (CPU/GPU) maintained by Ollama.

title: ollama-haystack (PyPI)
summary: Haystack integration offering OllamaGenerator and OllamaTextEmbedder nodes.

title: ollama-csharp – .NET client
summary: Community C# SDK for .NET 6+ with async chat, generate and show-model helpers.

title: ollama-obsidian – Obsidian plugin
summary: Obsidian community plugin that adds Ollama chat sidebar and note commands.

title: ollama-logseq – LogSeq extension
summary: LogSeq plugin to run local LLM prompts via Ollama inside your knowledge graph.

title: ollama-nix – Nix flake
summary: Official Nix flake for reproducible Ollama builds on Linux/macOS.

title: ollama-rag – Minimal RAG example
summary: Small Python repo showing retrieval-augmented generation using Ollama + Chroma.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Simple Python bot that exposes Ollama chat to a Discord server via slash commands.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app that lets teams query self-hosted Ollama models in channels/DMs.

title: ollama-elixir – Elixir client
summary: Community Elixir library for chatting with Ollama using Finch/Tesla HTTP clients.
